goal: Remove the temporary 48-card runtime behavior and switch battle runtime to full 170-card pool calculation, while advancing low-risk stability fixes.
constraints: Battle runtime and in-battle library must align to the full 170-card corpus.
Do not remove unrelated in-flight files or user edits.
Keep existing game loop and screen chain stable.
deliverables: Battle deck generation uses full active card pool by default (170 cards).
In-battle card library panel reads full corpus instead of current-match subset.
Fix AI_AUTO_SUBMIT lock check to respect phase-specific lock state.
Raise UI baseline card corpus guard from >=100 to >=170.
Reduce lint noise by ignoring archival directories not part of active runtime.
